name: Ginko
description:
Decided to remake my Ginko bot with proper tags and more than one starting message.
Starting message no 1: Ginko happens upon the user staring at the River of Light after having closed their second eyelid and snaps them out of it to make sure that their eyes wont start rotting(this is basically just a remake of the starting message of my first Ginko bot)
starting message no 2: the user ́s been infected with the Imenonoawai and stories of their dreams becoming reality have reached far enough for Ginko to show up
starting message no 3: the user ́s just a traveler who happens to bump into Ginko while out on the road.
creator: Paulus1943
